source_pr.title: ttl: ttl use timer framework to trigger jobs
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #45468

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: The case does not include a concrete flaky failure signature; the only explicit signal is enabling the race detector for the Bazel TTL worker target (`race = "on"`).
failure_signature: No concrete failure signature captured (only Bazel `race = "on"` change for TTL worker tests).
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch integrates TTL with the timer framework and enables running the Bazel target under the race detector, but this case does not capture an actual flaky failure signature or a targeted stabilization tied to a flaky mechanism. Classify as insufficient evidence rather than guessing a confirmed concurrency/data-race root cause.
fix_pattern: Enable running the relevant Bazel tests under the race detector (`race = "on"`); no specific flaky root cause is evidenced in the case.

evidence: files: domain/domain.go, timer/runtime/runtime.go, timer/runtime/runtime_test.go, timer/runtime/worker.go, ttl/client/command.go, ttl/client/notification.go, ttl/ttlworker/BUILD.bazel, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_integration_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/job_manager_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/session_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/task_manager.go, ttl/ttlworker/task_manager_test.go, ttl/ttlworker/timer.go, ttl/ttlworker/timer_sync.go, ttl/ttlworker/timer_sync_test.go
